title: Clokkworkk's Locator Maps
description: A simple mod that allows for the adding of custom Explorer Maps for any structure. Modded support included.
body:
This mod adds the simple functionality to allow developers and modpack creators to add customizable "Explorer Map" equivalents to their modpack / experience.

![An example locator map in a chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00fbe6c37f6c7999ed650784a7b777596c079eaa.png)

![A Desert Village map created by a locator map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16506d5b369813f3c39c224bae4edaf13d503697.png)

Locator Maps can be created for any structure, vanilla structures, datapack structures, or modded structures. Maps can be configured with any search radius as well as whether the final location's coordinates should be displayed or not.

Additionally, the maps can be configured to allow or disallow duplicate structure findings. This determines whether or not multiple maps can be made for the same structure at the same location.


For more information on using and setting up Locator Maps, check the [Wiki](https://github.com/CBSchiffer/LocatorMaps/wiki/Obtaining)!
